title: ようこそトレセン学園へ！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I-I... I hope, I hope I'm not bothering you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No need to be so formal. I should apologize for calling you here when
you're still settling in.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, not at all! Um, the p-p-p-privilege is all mine. ...No, wait, the
pleasure? U-um!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Well, I should start with an introduction. I am Symboli Rudolf,
Tracen Academy's student council president.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, we warmly welcome you. If you ever have any issues
with your student life, please feel free to let us know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! Pleased to meet you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Likewise. As you already know, Tracen Academy is the country's
greatest learning facility for Umamusume longing to enter the racing
world.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Here you'll inspire and be inspired through friendship and rivalry, find
your one and only trainer, and battle on with frenzied effort in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I expect you to work vigorously in achieving a bright future for
yourself. Welcome to Tracen Academy, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, I was hoping to offer you a tour after our meeting, but...
unfortunately, I have other affairs with the student council that I must
attend to.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Which! Means! That! It's my time to shine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When Prez is in trouble, I'm the one who comes running! Me, the
venerable Tokai Teio! Wahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-wh-where did you just come from?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio... it's fine if you want to kid around, but you could choose a
better time and place.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay, sorry about that. ♪ Ah, you're the new transfer student,
right? I'm Tokai Teio, nice to meetcha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get on with the tour! On your marks, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! W-wait for meeee!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Goodness...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Whatever the case, I know I can trust Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right then! Let the academy tour begin! First up, this is our classroom!
We gotta study too, you know!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Showing you this is pretty boring, yeah? Any old school has
classrooms. Come on! To the next place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh, already?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ta-daaaa! It's the turf track! From here on, you'll be training on this
beauty!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow, amazing! It's so well-kept and clean!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's all thanks to the maintenance staff! Thank you, staff, for
always supporting us!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, onto the next place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: There's more?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time for a back-to-back marathon through three training
facilities!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
First up is the school's gym. All the devices were built to be used by
us Umamusume, so going full throttle is totally okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is the pool! Being able to swim no matter the time of year is the
best! Incidentally, I'm especially great at diving!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But my number one thing is dancing! Forgetting to practice for the
winning concerts is a big no-no, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, and here, this is... Huh? New girl?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I'm here! Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmmm. Are you tired? Well, the academy is really spacious, and we have been running from place to place.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Weeeell... Yeah... All right, I've decided! Now's the perfect time, too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's move on to the last place in our tour!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this isn't Tracen Academy! Why are we at the Tokyo
Racecourse?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come, come, no need to fret the deets! Rather, we need to hurry up
before things start!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about the G1 race, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's part of the prestigious Twinkle Series that every racer
aspires to!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Within the series, the G1 races are the toppest of top-class! And this
one's about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Rounding the fourth corner is number three, Antagonist! But number
seven, Ribbon March, holds on! Look at her persevere!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes number ten, Ay Tanri, from the outside! She's pulling
to the front with incredible speed!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
200 meters to go! They're neck and neck for the lead! It's a close one!
They're running side by side, right up to the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooooow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Such thunderous cheering, it's like a storm! The crowd feels so electric! )

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So this is the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How about that, new giiirl? Tell me what you think of a real G1. ...Oh.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, doesn't look like I need to ask!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I feel so energized! No, maybe it's more like...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to be on that stage too! I want to appear in the Twinkle Series
and seize my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mom, Mama, now that I'm here at Tracen Academy in Tokyo, I'm
gonna give it everything I've got!
